v4_position: 主文 §5.7 head-to-head baseline (Klotz 2022 真正 paradigm)

round_1_2026_04_28.stage_1_data_check: PASS (12/12 files, params consistent, no NaN/Inf)

gemini.status: FAILED (UTF-8 中文路径 bug, exit 55)

v2a_canary_attempt_failed.error: RuntimeError: Loss was NaN for 1 times in a row. Stopped training.
v2a_canary_attempt_failed.root_cause: MaskedCMALLoss term `max(t*err, (t-1)*err) / b` explodes when b → softplus floor (~1e-5) while error is large; forward-pass loss becomes inf/NaN.
v2a_canary_attempt_failed.fix_attempt_b: Amendment B: clip_gradient_norm=1.0 only. INSUFFICIENT — see v2b.

v2c_canary_attempt_failed.error: RuntimeError: Loss was NaN for 1 times in a row. Stopped training.
v2c_canary_attempt_failed.fix_c_partial_progress: lr 1e-3 → 5e-4 + clip=1.0 让 NaN 推迟到 epoch 10 (vs v2b epoch 5, v2a epoch 7)，方向对但仍不够撑过 30 epoch。
v2c_canary_attempt_failed.true_root_cause: NH 1.13 的 basetrainer.py:336 设默认 `allow_subsequent_nan_losses=0` —— 任何 NaN batch 即时 raise，与 Klotz 2020 reference 实现的 skip-and-continue 循环不一致。前面 B/C 都在治标（降低 NaN 频率），D 是治本（让偶发 NaN 不致命）。
v2c_canary_attempt_failed.fix_d: Amendment D: allow_subsequent_nan_losses=5 (NH 默认 0)。Klotz reference 的 skip-NaN 循环就是这个语义；5 是宽松阈值（v2c 跑 ~16 万 batch 仅 1 次 NaN，连续 5 个 NaN 才视为真发散）。

v2b_canary_attempt_failed.error: RuntimeError: Loss was NaN for 1 times in a row. Stopped training.
v2b_canary_attempt_failed.fix_b_failure_diagnosis: clip_gradient_norm operates AFTER backprop; the NaN check (`basetrainer.py:337`) fires on forward loss being NaN, which clip cannot prevent. Loss inf comes from `error/b` overflow in forward, not from gradient explosion.
v2b_canary_attempt_failed.fix_c: Amendment C: lower initial LR 1e-3 → 5e-4 (halve schedule), match Klotz 2020 §A.2 reference exactly. Keep clip_gradient_norm=1.0 as belt-and-suspenders.
v2b_canary_attempt_failed.fix_authority: Klotz et al. 2020 (arXiv 2012.14295) §A.2 + §B.4: 'CMAL is more sensitive to learning rate than GMM; we use lr=5e-4 + grad clip 1.0.'
v2b_canary_attempt_failed.pipefail_check: set -eo pipefail caught nh-run failure correctly; evaluate/analyze did NOT bogus-run (vs v2a where they did).

phase_A_p0_fix.decision_gate_G: NSE >= 0.65 (vs exp002 0.738) → continue A1+A2; NSE < 0.65 → A3 root cause + Route D escalation
phase_A_p0_fix.A2: patch NH UncertaintyTester for mixture param save
phase_A_p0_fix.A3: NSE root cause diagnosis (CMAL vs GMM vs exp002)

phase_B_p1_hardening.B2: CRPS/PIT/Winkler for CMAL/GMM samples; HSCC: Winkler/interval score only (R3 mod #4)
phase_B_p1_hardening.B4: clip vs no-clip + linear vs log-target ablation (100 basin spot check)

phase_C_narrative_sync.C2: narrative §5.7 lock CMAL K=5 3-seed; GMM K=3 → supplementary; narrowness collapse as hypothesis (R3 mod #6)
phase_C_narrative_sync.C3: If main baseline list changes → explicit PCR + 3 AI re-sign

phase_D_fallback.trigger: A0 canary fail AND A3 confirms non-config issue
phase_D_fallback.action: Route D escalation: §5.7 main baseline → real independent-seed deep ensemble (5 seed deterministic LSTM, NOT single checkpoint reuse)
